name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_sht_uvw_nps04_nb_segmented
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_sht' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_nps04_nb_segmented' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  MAX(try_cast(`interval_start` AS TIMESTAMP)) AS latest_observed_ts,
  MIN(try_cast(`interval_start` AS TIMESTAMP)) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'interval_start' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_sht`.`uvw_nps04_nb_segmented`
